steps.title: Find the shared trait
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between Nora Bailey and Martha C. Whitfield. The notes say Bailey was the lighthouse keeper at Robbins Reef Light from 1894 to 1919, and Whitfield was the lighthouse keeper at Turkey Point Light from 1895 to 1919. The overlap is that both held the same type of job during the same general historical period.

steps.title: Keep the focus on similarity
steps.content: Choice A describes lighthouse keepers generally but does not name Bailey or Whitfield. Choice B discusses only Bailey, so it cannot show a similarity between the two women. Choice D stresses that they worked at different lighthouses, which emphasizes a difference. The sentence naming both women as lighthouse keepers in the late nineteenth and early twentieth centuries directly accomplishes the student's goal. The answer is C.
